title: Almiris Weapons
description: Wanna more different and exciting weapons? This mod is your choice that offers a refined and immersive fighting experience.

## Expand your Arsenal: 
Almiris Weapons introduces a starting collection of six distinct weapon types, with plans for future expansions. Each weapon is designed with unique stats, animations, and mechanics to suit different playstyles.

In every major X.0.0 update, six additional weapon types will be introduced, ensuring continuous expansion of your arsenal.

## Crafting Made Simple:

All weapons can be crafted using vanilla materials such as wood, stone, iron, gold, diamond, and netherite.

Recipes are simple and vanilla-friendly, making them easy to integrate into your survival experience.

The mod also includes integration for crafting with materials from other mods, allowing for enhanced compatibility.

## Better Combat Integration: Enjoy seamless compatibility with the Better Combat mod. Almiris Weapons takes full advantage of its features, offering:

Smooth animations for every weapon.

Support for dual-wielding to add depth to your combat strategy.

Specialized attack combos and effects tailored for each weapon type.

## Craft, Explore, and Dominate:

Discover new crafting recipes and upgrade paths to unlock the full potential of your arsenal.

Test your skills against mobs and other players using these enhanced weapons.

Forge your path as the ultimate warrior, adventurer, or defender of your world.

## Key Features:

Six weapon types at launch: halberds, rapiers, claymores, sai, battle axes, and maces.

Regular updates adding six new weapon types in each major X.0.0 release.

Customizable combat experience with full Better Combat integration.

Immersive visual and sound effects for enhanced gameplay.

Perfect for survival worlds, RPG servers, or PvP arenas.

With Almiris Weapons, combat becomes more than just a necessity — it’s an art. Are you ready to wield the power of new battle arsenal?
